llvm::SPII Namespace Reference

Enumerations

enum  { Pseudo = (1<<0) , Load = (1<<1) , Store = (1<<2) , DelaySlot = (1<<3) }

Detailed Description

SPII - This namespace holds all of the target specific flags that instruction info tracks.
